description_long: This warehouse is a rectangular, single-story structure with a gabled roof covered in a muted, corrugated metal pattern. The exterior walls are clad in vertically aligned, greenish-gray metal panels, giving it a utilitarian and industrial appearance. The front facade features a large, open loading bay with a ramp extending outward, suitable for vehicle or pallet access. There are no visible windows or decorative elements, emphasizing function over form. The roof overhangs slightly on all sides, providing minimal shelter at the edges. The overall design is simple and robust, typical of storage or logistics facilities in urban or industrial zones.
description: A rectangular, metal-clad warehouse with a gabled roof and a large open loading bay at the front. The design is utilitarian, with no windows or decorative features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large open loading bay and ramp, with the gabled roof and vertical metal siding clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the long, uninterrupted metal wall and the overhanging roof, with the ramp partially visible at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the plain, windowless metal wall and the gabled roof, with no entry points or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same long, featureless metal wall and roof overhang, with the ramp edge visible at the front.
attribute_facade_design: The main facade is clad in vertically oriented, greenish-gray corrugated metal panels and features a large, open loading bay with a ramp. There are no windows or decorative elements, emphasizing a purely functional design.
attribute_roof_structure: The roof is a simple gabled structure covered in corrugated metal, with a slight overhang on all sides and no visible skylights or rooftop equipment.
